See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 35442 => 'Keflavík', 35446 => 'Akureyri', 3545 => 'Reykjavík', 35455 => 'Reykjavík/Vesturbær/Miðbærinn', 35456 => 'Reykjavík/Vesturbær/Miðbærinn', ];
